text.value: select count(*) as total_count from @{pipeline().parameters.schema}.@{pipeline().parameters.table} where last_updated > '@{activity('last_cdc').output.firstRow.cdc_timestamp}'

select count(*) as total_count from @{pipeline().parameters.schema}.@{pipeline().parameters.table} where last_updated > '@{if(empty(pipeline().parameters.backdate),activity('last_cdc').output.firstRow.cdc_timestamp,pipeline().parameters.backdate)}'
